case_title: COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, A CALIFORNIA VS. ROBERT DAVIS et al

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-27-2002 - CASE DID NOT SETTLE, TRIAL DATE IS CONFIRMED. PRESENT: COMMISSIONER LORETTA M. NORRIS; CLERK: P. DIAS; REPORTER: LOIS JONES.

calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-02-2002 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-02-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Lois Jones. Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiff, Community Housing Partnership. Also present, Latonia Johnson, Representative of Community Housing Partnership. Defendant, Robert Davis, appeared in pro per. The matter did not settle and the trial date is confirmed.
